name: Vegas, Red Rock & Valley of Fire
subtitle: Neon lights meet ancient desert landscapes

items.title: Arrive Harry Reid International
items.detail: Terminal 1, baggage claim C

items.title: Lunch at Mon Ami Gabi
items.detail: French bistro with Strip-side patio at Paris Las Vegas

items.title: Mob Museum
items.detail: Three-floor interactive museum of organized crime history

items.title: Neon Museum
items.detail: Outdoor gallery of iconic vintage Las Vegas signs

items.title: Dinner at Hell's Kitchen
items.detail: Gordon Ramsay's flagship at Caesars Palace

items.title: Fremont Street Experience
items.detail: Viva Vision light show and live music downtown

items.title: Check into The Venetian
items.detail: Suite on the Strip with canal views

items.title: Drive to Red Rock Canyon
items.detail: 30 minutes west via W Charleston Blvd

items.title: Calico Tanks Trail hike
items.detail: 2.5 mi round trip to natural water tank with Strip views

items.title: 13-Mile Scenic Drive
items.detail: One-way loop road through red sandstone formations

items.title: Lunch at Red Rock Casino Resort
items.detail: Multiple dining options at the resort near the canyon

items.title: Bellagio Conservatory & Botanical Gardens
items.detail: Free seasonal floral displays under glass

items.title: High Roller Observation Wheel
items.detail: 550-ft wheel with panoramic views of the Strip at sunset

items.title: Dinner at Lotus of Siam
items.detail: Award-winning Thai cuisine in Midtown

items.title: The Venetian
items.detail: Second night on the Strip

items.title: Drive to Valley of Fire State Park
items.detail: 50 minutes northeast via I-15

items.title: Fire Wave Trail
items.detail: 1.5 mi round trip to stunning striped sandstone wave

items.title: White Domes Loop
items.detail: 1.25 mi loop through slot canyon and red formations

items.title: Elephant Rock & Arch Rock
items.detail: Short walk to iconic natural stone formations

items.title: Lunch at Inside Scoop
items.detail: Casual dining in Overton, just outside the park

items.title: Drive back to Las Vegas
items.detail: 50 minutes south via I-15

items.title: Bellagio Fountains at sunset
items.detail: Free water show every 15 minutes

items.title: Depart Harry Reid International
items.detail: Terminal 1, evening flight home
